title: Boxy's Backrooms
description: This mod adds the backrooms as much as I can
body:
In order to noclip, crouch on the block.

<details>
  <summary>TO ENTER THE ROOMS:</summary>
  Craft a wallpaper block with an ender pearl, 1 yellow concrete, and 4 amethyst shards. Noclip into it. IT IS NOT A PORTAL BLOCK, AND AS OF NOW, SAND DOES NOT NOCLIP YOU (And if it did, you would end up somewhere else entirely)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Levels currently added</summary>

- Level 0 (The Backrooms)
- Level 0.2 (Remodelled Mess)
- Level -0.2 (Custom Level)
- Pitfalls (Custom Level)
- Level 1 (Habitable Zone)
- Level 2 (Pipe Dreams)
- Level 3 (Electrical Station)
- Level 4 (Abandoned Offices)
- Level 6 (Pitch Black)
- Level 7 (Endless Ocean)
- Level 8 (Cave Systems)
- Level 94 (Rolling Hills)
- The Broken (Custom Level)

</details>

AS OF April 21, 2026, this is only tested on 26.1, however it will LIKELY work on 26.1.x

This is not at all finished.
